TextView.android:text:
Introduction
CiviReport respects the privacy of its users and is committed to protecting personal information in accordance with the Data Privacy Act of 2012 (Republic Act No. 10173) of the Philippines. This Privacy Policy explains how information is collected, used, and protected when users interact with the platform.

Information We Collect
The platform may collect the following information:
Personal Information:
• Name
• Contact number
• Email address
• Barangay or location information
Report Information:
• Issue descriptions
• Photos or attachments
• Location of reported issues
Technical Information:
• Device type
• App usage data
• System logs

How We Use the Information
Collected information may be used to:
• Process and manage submitted reports
• Allow barangay officials to respond to community concerns
• Improve the functionality and performance of the platform
• Maintain security and prevent misuse of the system

Data Sharing
Personal information will only be shared with authorized barangay officials responsible for handling reported issues. CiviReport does not sell, trade, or rent user information to third parties.

Data Security
CiviReport implements reasonable technical and organizational measures to protect user data from unauthorized access, loss, or misuse. However, no digital platform can guarantee absolute security.

Data Retention
User data and reports may be retained as long as necessary for record-keeping, issue tracking, and administrative purposes.

User Rights
In accordance with the Data Privacy Act, users have the right to:
• Access their personal information
• Request correction of inaccurate data
• Request deletion of their personal information when appropriate

Data Privacy Compliance
CiviReport complies with the provisions of the Data Privacy Act of 2012 (Republic Act No. 10173) of the Philippines. The platform ensures that personal data collected from users is processed lawfully, fairly, and securely. All personal information is handled only for legitimate purposes related to the operation of the platform, including the management of barangay issue reports and communication with authorized barangay officials. Appropriate technical and organizational measures are implemented to protect user data against unauthorized access, disclosure, alteration, or destruction.

Contact Information
For questions or concerns regarding this Privacy Policy, users may contact the platform administrators through the official support channels of CiviReport.

By using the platform, users also agree to the collection and processing of their information as described in the CiviReport Privacy Policy.

CheckBox.android:text: I have read and agree to the Privacy Policy
